atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports acne on the face.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports acne located on the face, which started approximately two years ago.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports the acne is present most days.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports she has been using Persa-gel and washing regularly, which provides some improvement.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports no associated symptoms such as itching, bleeding, or pain.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports she lives with her parents and sister and has a dog, bird, and bunnies.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports she is in 7th grade and plays basketball, volleyball, and tap.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports she uses sunscreen SPF 30 in the summer.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports a flare-up when she started school sports in the fall due to sweating.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient denies any worsening with her menstrual cycle.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports regular periods.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: A physical exam revealed multiple benign nevi on the trunk and extremities.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The skin was scattered with skin-colored papules, open and closed comedones, and erythrema papules primarily on the forehead and central cheeks and chin.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The chest and back were relatively spared.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician prescribes adapalene 0.1% cream

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician prescribes a mild cleanser

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician prescribes a noncomedogenic moisturizer

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician prescribes SPF 30 or higher sunscreen

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician prescribes Clean & Clear Persa-gel

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician plans topical therapy

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician orders a follow-up in six months

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician instructs the patient to wash face with cleanser morning and evening

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician instructs the patient to apply adapalene cream to acne areas

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician instructs the patient to gradually increase adapalene application to nightly

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician instructs the patient to be aware of potential sensitivity and dryness from retinoids

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports right knee pain.
